title: PRD: Thermal management for the coolant loop
body:
## Summary

The controller keeps the coolant loop inside its thermal envelope: it decodes sensor frames, drives the coolant valve on over-temp, and surfaces faults. This PRD is the parent issue of the Feature's stories (#42, #43, #44); it is not a story itself and is never selected for implementation. It gains `state:ready` only once the story breakdown is complete.

## Stories

- #42 Parser: reject malformed sensor frames with a typed error
- #43 Actuator: drive the coolant valve open on over-temp
- #44 Decide the over-temp ceiling + hysteresis values

Depends on: #40
